headline: Planner starts now keep the city/sample context visible instead of feeling cold.
notes: Planner links from city guides now carry a city-start context into the route start screen.
Planner links from sample pages now carry the sample title and city so the route opens with clearer continuity.
Added a planner entry-context card that explains why this route start is showing up and what it is based on.
Kept the change lightweight so existing planner links still work even without the new context parameters.
